headline: Can GE HealthCare (GEHC) Turn AI Workflow Tools Into a Durable Edge in Hospital Integration?
summary: In late February and early March 2026, GE HealthCare highlighted new AI-powered, cloud-first software platforms at HIMSS, renewed a US$0.50 billion 364-day revolving credit facility, and saw Gentuity LLC announce a U.S. commercial collaboration to expand access to its HF-OCT imaging system alongside GE HealthCare’s interventional portfolio. A particularly important development is GE HealthCare’s role as a founding member of the HL7 Caliper FHIR Accelerator, which aims to standardize...
